'''C'taunmar''' was an [[A-wing]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] who controlled the starfighter base on [[Di'tai'ni]]. She fought under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] in the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Yaga Minor]]. She volunteered to screen the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' during the attack, but Bel Iblis refused, as [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] would ruin the ruse that the ''Errant Venture'' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship.
